hypotheses.title: STRC Pharmacochaperone Virtual Screen E1659A
hypotheses.status: Small-molecule ear drop binds electropositive K1141 pocket on E1659A STRC via Coulomb attraction. Matched-ensemble APBS 2026-04-25: MUT +5.99±1.37 vs WT +1.46±1.55 kT/e (n=20 each), Δ=+4.53±0.46 kT/e = −2.79±0.28 kcal/m…
hypotheses.nextStep: Wetlab handoff packet v0.1 delivered 2026-04-27. H01 is ready for assay-scoping RFQ, not lead-candidate nomination. P0 next: send separate RFQs for (1) v5.3 custom synthesis of 1-indanyl_acylsulfonamide_SO2Me_-Cl + adamantyl_acylsulfonamide_SO2Me_-Cl, optional adamantyl_-CF3; (2) STRC 1066-1216 K1141-fragment WT/E1659…

hypotheses.title: STRC Piezoelectric TM Bioelectronic Amplifier
hypotheses.status: PVDF-TrFE nanofilm on OHC-apical membrane drives prestin via extracellular piezoelectric field; bypasses native STRC entirely.
hypotheses.nextStep: Blocked on literature — V_saturation, OHC membrane resistance, 210 kPa Young's modulus all unsourced; TM displacement 5–30 nm is in-house assumption. No compute advance until primary lit retrieved.

hypotheses.title: STRC Mini-STRC Single-Vector Hypothesis
hypotheses.status: Truncated STRC (Ultra-Mini 1075-1775) packaged into single AAV for DFNB16 gene therapy — current S-tier lead strategy.
hypotheses.nextStep: Order Ultra-Mini gBlock + B8+WPRE3 cassette; clone pAAV B8-IgK-Ultra-Mini-WPRE3-bGH; Phase 4 HEK coIP. Verify B8 exact cloned sequence against Zhao 2025 Table S2 before GMP submission (cloning QC, not design blocker).

hypotheses.title: STRC mRNA-LNP Strategy B Full-Length
hypotheses.status: mRNA encoding STRC delivered via cochlear LNP; intraductal dosing avoids AAV packaging limits and enables repeat administration.
hypotheses.nextStep: No fast compute-to-S path; keep as AAV maintenance/interim only unless new OHC-LNP tropism data reaches therapeutic population coverage

hypotheses.title: STRC Calcium Oscillation Acoustic Therapy
hypotheses.status: Chronic 45-60 dB sound via hearing aid drives AC1-CREB signaling → endogenous STRC upregulation (Touch Grass as therapy).
hypotheses.nextStep: Blocked — 6 load-bearing parameters without primary lit (STRC mRNA t½, STRC protein t½, STRC copy #/OHC, CRE K_half, PDE4 Vmax OHC, CaMKII k_auto). Three require own wet-lab. No compute advance until own measurements or literature-absence explicitly documented in each script.

hypotheses.title: STRC mRNA Therapy Hypothesis
hypotheses.status: Protein-replacement via direct mRNA to OHCs with OHC-tropic LNP formulation (variant of h04 emphasising tropism).
hypotheses.nextStep: No fast compute-to-S path; needs primary OHC RBM24 titration/Sun 2026 quantification before another model can change tier

hypotheses.title: Prime Editing for STRC
hypotheses.status: PE3b allele-discriminating edit of maternal E1659A locus — killed 2026-04-22 by STRCP1 paralog cross-hybridization on 61/61 pegRNAs.

hypotheses.title: STRC ASO Exon Skipping
hypotheses.status: Splice-switching ASO targeting cryptic exons E1-E4 — killed 2026-04-22 by STRCP1 paralog cross on 54/54 candidates.

hypotheses.title: STRC Synthetic Peptide Hydrogel HTC
hypotheses.status: Self-assembling peptide ear drop forms synthetic horizontal top connectors without gene delivery (SAP hydrogel strategy).
hypotheses.nextStep: Reviewer-pack queue staged 2026-04-27 after Phase 4m S promotion. Next sessions should start at STRC h09 Reviewer Pack Queue 2026-04-27 and work in order: premortem -> precedent table -> orthogonal WH2 controls -> transfer memo. Phase 4m remains the gate-closing evidence (R2=0.690, Kd_F=1.48 mM); Phase 4k is a support…

hypotheses.title: STRC In Situ SpyCatcher Assembly
hypotheses.status: Split-SpyCatcher/SpyTag peptide fragments covalently assemble a STRC-equivalent scaffold in perilymph after topical delivery.

hypotheses.title: STRC Engineered TECTA Chimera
hypotheses.status: Re-engineer the tectorial membrane to anchor to bundles without STRC, via AAV-delivered TECTA chimera to supporting cells.

hypotheses.title: Sonogenetic STRC Computational Proof
hypotheses.status: Sonogenetic stimulation of OHCs using acoustically-gated ion channels (MscL or TRP variants) to restore mechanotransduction.

hypotheses.title: STRC Programmable Recombinases
hypotheses.status: Seamless recombinase-based editing for DFNB16 (Lilly 2026 cochlear recombinase framework adapted to STRC locus).

hypotheses.title: STRC Protein Replacement Therapy
hypotheses.status: Direct STRC protein delivery to perilymph via intratympanic injection; bypass genetic intervention entirely.

hypotheses.title: STRC OTOA Paralog Cross-Rescue
hypotheses.status: Upregulate OTOA (STRC paralog) to take over HTC/TM anchor function — chimera avenue killed on Cα RMSD 13.78 Å (ARM region).

hypotheses.title: STRC ZP Domain Prion-Like Seeding
hypotheses.status: Low-dose WT STRC templates Misha's folded E1659A monomers into mixed fibrils (prion-like cross-templating seeding therapy).

hypotheses.title: STRC Engineered Homodimer Avidity
hypotheses.status: Single-point mutation (R1581Y/F, S1579W/F) stabilises weak Ultra-Mini homodimer interface → 100-1000× avidity on Mini-STRC with zero new AAV payload.
hypotheses.nextStep: Paused: Phase 1d A1078C/S1080C/S1579C/A1078W all fail AF3 G1; no further compute unless a new scaffold/interface appears

hypotheses.title: STRC STRCP1 Activation Rescue
hypotheses.status: Reframe STRCP1 paralog identity as asset — CRISPRa activates endogenous STRCP1 as STRC backup; Gate 1 = wet-lab ribosome profiling.
